key_concepts: The limitation of raw term frequencies (common words dominate the signal).
Term Frequency (TF) captures local importance in a document.
Inverse Document Frequency (IDF) penalizes words common across all documents.
TF-IDF multiplication balances local importance with global rarity.

definitions.definition: Ukuran seberapa sering sebuah kata muncul di dalam satu dokumen tertentu.
Ukuran kejarangan sebuah kata di seluruh kumpulan dokumen, memberikan bobot lebih pada kata yang jarang.
Skema pembobotan teks yang mengalikan TF dan IDF untuk menonjolkan kata yang spesifik pada suatu dokumen.

examples: Contrasting a common word like 'dan' with a rare word like 'mitokondria' in a biology corpus.

relations.builds_toward: The text case study in s07 which contrasts this designed representation against learned embeddings.

exclusions: Detailed mathematical derivation or logarithm base variations (keep it conceptual and practical).
